hero.description: Karu connects travellers, diaspora, and locals with verified car rental providers in Douala and Yaoundé. No stress, no hidden arrangements, no surprises.

about.heading: Built for Cameroon,
about.paragraph1: Car rental in Cameroon runs on personal contacts, informal networks, and luck. No transparency, no guarantees, no structure. Travellers arrive hoping for the best.
about.paragraph2: Karu organises this into a single trusted platform. Verified providers, transparent pricing, and pre-arrival confirmation so you can land with confidence.

cards.title: Launching First In
cards.body: Douala and Yaoundé, Cameroon's two largest cities and economic hubs.

cards.title: Focussed On
cards.body: Airport pickups, arriving travellers, and diaspora visitors who need reliability.

cards.title: For Everyone
cards.body: Tourists, business travellers, and locals who want a documented rental experience.

cards.title: Core Promise
cards.body: Verified providers, transparent pricing, pre-arrival lock-in.

cards.title: The Reality
cards.body: The demand and supply is real. The structure and trust are missing. We bring both to Cameroon.

how_it_works.heading: From search to keys in hand

steps.title: Search
steps.description: Browse verified vehicles in Douala or Yaoundé. Filter by type, price, and pickup location.

steps.title: Request
steps.description: Send a booking request before you land. Choose your dates and preferred pickup point.

steps.title: Confirm
steps.description: Vendor approves within 24 hrs. Pay securely through the platform. Fast and transparent.

steps.title: Drive
steps.description: Arrive, collect your car, drive. Fully confirmed, zero surprises. Leave a review when done.

features.heading: Everything you need, nothing you don't

cards.label: Verified Vendors
cards.description: Identity checked and document verified before going live.

cards.label: Secure Payments
cards.description: Multiple payment options built for Cameroon. Fast, simple, and transparent.

cards.label: Pre-Arrival Booking
cards.description: Lock in your car from anywhere before you land.

cards.label: Reviews & Reputation
cards.description: Two-sided reviews build accountability for both customers and vendors.

cards.label: Driver Add-ons
cards.description: Phase 2: driver services, long-term rentals, insurance partnerships, more cities.

cards.label: In-App Chat
cards.description: Message vendors directly inside Karu. No need to share personal numbers.

cities.heading: Starting where it matters most

douala.name: Douala
douala.description: Cameroon's economic capital and busiest port. Highest concentration of business travellers, diaspora returnees, and international arrivals.

yaounde.name: Yaoundé
yaounde.description: The political capital. Nsimalen International Airport serves government officials, NGO workers, and business visitors.

cities.more_cities: More cities across Central & West Africa in Phase 3

waitlist.heading: Get Early Access
waitlist.description: Be the first to know when Karu goes live. Vendors get priority placement. Customers get first-mover pricing.
waitlist.no_spam: No spam · We'll notify you when we launch in your city
waitlist.success_douala: We'll notify you when Karu launches in Douala.
waitlist.success_yaounde: We'll notify you when Karu launches in Yaoundé.
waitlist.success_other: We'll notify you when Karu comes to your city.
waitlist.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
waitlist.error_rate_limit: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
waitlist.count_label: Join {count} others already on the waitlist
waitlist.consent_label: I agree to the processing of my data as described in the <link>Privacy Policy</link>.
waitlist.consent_error: Please agree to the privacy policy to continue

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1_body: When you join the Karu waitlist, we collect your email address, user type (customer or vendor), and city. We also store a hashed (non-reversible) version of your IP address for security purposes only.
privacy.s2_body: We use your email solely to notify you when Karu launches in your city. We do not sell, share, or use your data for advertising. We do not use cookies or tracking pixels.
privacy.s3_body: We use Plausible Analytics, a privacy-first, cookieless analytics tool. No personal data is collected. No consent banner is required.
privacy.s4_body: You may request deletion of your data at any time by emailing hello@getkaru.io. We will remove your record within 72 hours.
privacy.s5_body: Your data is stored securely on Supabase infrastructure in the EU West region. All data is encrypted at rest and in transit.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1_body: By joining the Karu waitlist, you agree to receive a single notification email when Karu launches in your city. You may unsubscribe at any time by replying to any email or contacting us at hello@getkaru.io.
terms.s2_body: Karu is currently in pre-launch. Joining the waitlist does not guarantee access to the platform, a specific launch date, or any pricing. We reserve the right to modify or cancel the service at any time.
terms.s3_body: You agree not to submit false information, abuse the waitlist system, or attempt to interfere with the platform in any way.
terms.s4_body: All content, branding, and design on this site is the property of Karu. You may not reproduce or distribute it without written permission.
terms.s5_body: These terms are governed by the laws of Cameroon. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of Douala, Cameroon.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: We're a small team building something meaningful for Cameroon. Reach out, we read every message.

privacy_rights.title: Your Data Rights
privacy_rights.intro: Under Cameroon's Law No. 2024/017 on the protection of personal data, you have the right to access, export, delete, and object to the processing of your personal data. Karu currently holds waitlist data only: your email, chosen city, and, for vendors, business contact details.
privacy_rights.how_body: Enter your email and choose a request. We will send a confirmation link to that address. The link expires in 24 hours. Once you confirm, we act on the request immediately and keep a record of it, as the law requires.
privacy_rights.submitted_body: If we hold data for this address, a confirmation email is on its way. Click the link inside to complete your request.
privacy_rights.status_deleted: Your data has been deleted. We hold no further personal data for that address.
privacy_rights.status_objection: Done. You will no longer receive marketing emails from Karu.
privacy_rights.status_invalid: That link is invalid or has expired. Please submit a new request below.
privacy_rights.status_error: Something went wrong handling your request. Please try again or email privacy@getkaru.io.
privacy_rights.contact_body: You can also exercise any of these rights by writing to privacy@getkaru.io. We respond to all requests.
privacy_rights.error_email: Please enter a valid email address
privacy_rights.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
